allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('./node_modules/@element-plus/icons-vue'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('M'\) || k.startsWith\('T'\)\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('./node_modules/@element-plus/icons-vue'\); console.log\('Magic:', !!icons.Magic\); console.log\('MagicStick:', !!icons.MagicStick\); console.log\('Right:', !!icons.Right\); console.log\('Trophy:', !!icons.Trophy\); console.log\('Money:', !!icons.Money\); console.log\('Tickets:', !!icons.Tickets\); console.log\('User:', !!icons.User\); console.log\('Magic exists as:', Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('magic'\)\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Right-like:', Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('right'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")
